prompt: A hyper-realistic, cinematic wide shot of a formal garden. In the center, a topiary bush has been trimmed into an incredibly complex, jagged, and nonsensical shape that perfectly and obsessively mimics the rusted, broken pattern of a background iron fence. The gardener stands by with tiny nail scissors, looking exhausted. 8k resolution, photorealistic, no text, no diagrams, soft natural morning light.
metaphor: The gardener trims the hedge to match the 'noise' (the broken fence) so perfectly that the hedge loses its general purpose and form.
